evaluation.notes: One evaluation step: Trading Combine. After passing, traders move to an Express Funded Account where payouts begin. A Live Funded Account is a later upgrade, not part of the challenge steps. Two Trading Combine paths: Standard ($49/$99/$149 per month, $149 activation fee when funded) and No Activation Fee ($109/$159/$209 per month, no activation fee when funded). Profit targets: $3,000 ($50K), $6,000 ($100K), $9,000 ($150K). Daily loss limits: $1,000 ($50K), $1,500 ($100K), $2,000 ($150K). Maximum loss limits: $2,000 ($50K), $3,000 ($100K), $4,500 ($150K). No time limits on the Trading Combine. Consistency target: Best Day Profit / Overall Profit must not exceed 50%. Scaling plan: 5 lots ($50K), 10 lots ($100K), 15 lots ($150K). TopstepX uses 10:1 micro-to-mini ratio. All positions must be closed by 3:10 PM CT daily. Express Funded Account payout paths: Standard (5 winning days at $150+ Net P&L, up to $5,000 per request) and Consistency (3 days + 40% consistency target, up to $6,000 per request), both limited to 50% of account balance. After first payout in Express Funded, Maximum Loss Limit is set to $0. Live Funded Account: daily payouts up to 100% after 30 winning days.

payouts.schedule: On-demand (as little as 3 days); Express Funded Standard or Consistency path

rules.consistencyRule: Best Day Profit / Overall Profit must not exceed 50%
rules.notes: One evaluation step: Trading Combine → Express Funded Account (payouts begin) → Live Funded Account (later upgrade). Two Trading Combine paths: Standard and No Activation Fee. All positions must be closed by 3:10 PM CT daily — no overnight or weekend holding. News trading permitted but caution advised. Copy trading and EAs: not presented as cleanly supported features by Topstep. HFT, system manipulation, spoofing prohibited. Scaling plan: 5 lots ($50K), 10 lots ($100K), 15 lots ($150K). TopstepX uses 10:1 micro-to-mini ratio. TopstepX allows personal daily loss limit on new or reset accounts. Minimum payout request: $125. ACH and Wire payout requests include a $30 processing fee. After first payout, Maximum Loss Limit is set to $0. For traders who joined on or after 12 January 2026, payouts are subject to a 90/10 split.

markets.instruments: Futures — Forex (8), Equity Indices (9), Oil & Gas (8), Precious Metals (5), Agricultural (7)
